Live arrival guarantee: Most breeders include a live arrival guarantee (LAG) with overnight or 2-day shipping. Check individual seller shipping policies before ordering. Live insects are temperature-sensitive — avoid ordering during extreme heat or cold.

Buying tips

Look for captive-bred specimens rather than wild-caught. Buy subadults or adults if you're a beginner, as they're easier to care for than young nymphs. Inspect for signs of stress or illness before purchasing - healthy mantises should be alert and responsive.
